touches.ai_summary: Harper Lewis from IndigoDigital submitted an inbound request expressing interest in improving their sales-to-CS handoff process. Brief form submission indicated they're currently evaluating solutions.
next_steps: Follow up with introductory email and calendar link

touches.ai_summary: Sent introductory email to Harper thanking them for their interest. Provided overview of our platform's handoff capabilities and shared calendar link for initial qualification call.

Brief qualification call with Harper to understand basic needs. IndigoDigital has 1000 employees and struggles with context loss during sales-to-CS transitions. Harper mentioned they're also looking at Fathom.

questions_asked.question: What's driving you to look for a solution now?
questions_asked.answer: We're losing too much context when deals move from sales to CS, causing onboarding delays

questions_asked.question: How does your solution differ from Fathom?
questions_asked.answer: We focus specifically on cross-team handoffs with structured playbooks, while Fathom is more general-purpose recording

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email sharing customer case studies focused on sales-to-CS handoff improvements. Highlighted ROI metrics and confirmed next week's discovery call.

questions_asked.question: Do you have examples from other vertical SaaS companies?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, attached case study from similar-sized vertical SaaS company that reduced onboarding time by 40%

next_steps: Discovery call scheduled for next week

touches.ai_summary: Discovery call to understand current process. Harper walked through their existing handoff workflow - currently manual notes in Salesforce. Team of ~20 AEs handing off to 15 CSMs.

questions_asked.question: How many deals transition monthly?
questions_asked.answer: About 30-40 new customers per month

questions_asked.question: What information gets lost most often?
questions_asked.answer: Customer pain points, promised features, and key stakeholder concerns

touches.ai_summary: Continued discovery focusing on pain points. Harper shared that CS team often discovers surprises 2-3 weeks into onboarding. Discussed integration requirements with their existing stack.

questions_asked.question: What systems need to integrate with this solution?
questions_asked.answer: Salesforce, Slack, and our internal customer success platform

touches.ai_summary: Deep dive on IndigoDigital's decision process. Harper mentioned Amelia Garcia (CRO) will need to approve, and Amelia Baker in procurement will handle contracting. Budget allocated for Q2. Timeline to decide by end of month.

questions_asked.question: Who else needs to be involved in the decision?
questions_asked.answer: Amelia Garcia our CRO is the final approver, and Amelia Baker will handle procurement

questions_asked.question: What's your typical implementation timeline?
questions_asked.answer: Usually 2-3 weeks for core setup, then we work with your team on custom playbooks

questions_asked.question: What's driving your timeline?
questions_asked.answer: We want to have this in place before our busy summer season kicks off

touches.ai_summary: Final discovery call synthesizing all previous conversations. Confirmed 20 seats needed (sales + CS leadership). Harper emphasized importance of automated note-taking and AI-powered summaries. Mentioned Fathom's pricing is lower but lacks workflow automation.

questions_asked.question: Can we try this with a small team first?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we can start with a pilot group of 5-10 users before full rollout

questions_asked.question: What would make this a no-brainer decision for you?
questions_asked.answer: Proving we can capture the nuanced context that gets lost today, not just transcripts

touches.ai_summary: Comprehensive product demo focused on sales-to-CS handoff workflow. Walked through automated call summarization, structured handoff templates, and Salesforce integration. Harper was particularly impressed with AI-generated customer profiles and risk flagging.

questions_asked.question: Can we customize the handoff template fields?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, fully customizable templates per your workflow

questions_asked.question: How accurate is the AI summarization?
questions_asked.answer: 95%+ accuracy, and reps can edit before syncing to CS team

questions_asked.question: Does this address your concerns about context loss?
questions_asked.answer: Definitely, this is exactly what we need. Want to test with our actual calls

touches.ai_summary: Technical evaluation session with Harper and two team members testing the platform with real call recordings. Walked through API integration, security protocols, and data handling. Team tested Salesforce sync and Slack notifications.

questions_asked.question: How is our call data stored and who has access?
questions_asked.answer: SOC 2 compliant, encrypted at rest and in transit, you control all access permissions

questions_asked.question: Can we integrate this with our existing Salesforce workflows?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, demonstrated custom field mapping and automated task creation

questions_asked.question: Any technical blockers we should address?
questions_asked.answer: No blockers, we'll need IT to whitelist your domains but that's standard

next_steps: Gather feedback from sales and CS teams

touches.ai_summary: Check-in email during trial period asking for initial feedback. Shared additional training resources and best practices documentation.

questions_asked.question: Do you have a best practices guide for rolling this out to the team?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, attached change management playbook and training schedule template

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email with ROI calculator based on IndigoDigital's metrics. Showed potential time savings of 8-10 hours per week across the team and reduction in onboarding escalations.
Sent formal proposal email outlining 20-seat package with automations plus consulting services. Included implementation timeline, training plan, and pricing breakdown for annual contract.

Proposal review call with Harper. Walked through pricing, implementation plan, and success metrics. Harper mentioned budget is tight and asked about potential flexibility. Discussed value of consulting services for custom playbook development.

questions_asked.question: Is there flexibility on the annual price?
questions_asked.answer: Let me see what we can do - what budget range were you thinking?

questions_asked.question: What's your approval process from here?
questions_asked.answer: I need to present to Amelia Garcia next week, then procurement review with Amelia Baker

objections: Pricing is higher than Fathom's quote

touches.ai_summary: Executive meeting with Amelia Garcia (CRO) and Harper. Presented business case focusing on revenue retention impact and CS efficiency. Amelia asked about competitor comparison and pricing justification given Fathom's lower cost.

questions_asked.question: Why should we pay more than Fathom when they cover the basics?
questions_asked.answer: Fathom is a recording tool - we're a complete workflow solution with handoff automation, custom playbooks, and CS-specific features

questions_asked.question: What's the expected ROI timeline?
questions_asked.answer: Most clients see measurable impact within 60 days - reduced onboarding time and fewer CS escalations

questions_asked.question: Does this align with your CS strategy?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we're investing heavily in CS efficiency this year. Need to see sharper pricing though

objections: Need to justify premium over Fathom to finance team

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up exec meeting with Amelia Garcia focusing on competitive differentiation and long-term value. Shared customer testimonials from similar companies who switched from Fathom. Discussed potential discount to close this quarter.

questions_asked.question: What discount can you offer to get this done by month-end?
questions_asked.answer: I can propose up to 20% off year one if we can finalize by end of quarter

questions_asked.question: Would that work within your budget?
questions_asked.answer: That gets us closer. Let me discuss with Harper and our procurement team

touches.ai_summary: Negotiation call with Harper to discuss revised pricing. Proposed 25% discount to close this month, bringing ACV to $15,600 for 20 seats with consulting. Harper appreciates the movement and will present to Amelia Garcia and procurement.

questions_asked.question: Can we lock this price for a multi-year deal?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we can guarantee this rate for years 2-3 with annual commitment

questions_asked.question: What would you need to get this approved this week?
questions_asked.answer: I need to confirm with Amelia Garcia and get Amelia Baker to review the contract terms

objections: Still concerned about justifying premium vs Fathom internally

touches.ai_summary: Email confirmation of revised pricing proposal at $15,600 ACV with 25% discount. Included competitive analysis document showing feature gaps in Fathom and ROI projections specific to IndigoDigital's use case.

Scheduled pricing review call was rescheduled by Harper - noted she needed more time to align with Amelia Garcia on budget. Brief conversation confirmed still interested but internal approvals taking longer than expected.

questions_asked.question: Any concerns we should address?
questions_asked.answer: No major concerns, just need to get everyone aligned on the investment

touches.ai_summary: Rescheduled pricing call with Harper. She confirmed Amelia Garcia approved the budget at discounted price. Discussion focused on contract terms, payment schedule, and implementation timeline. Amelia Baker from procurement will join final review.

questions_asked.question: Can we do quarterly payments instead of annual upfront?
questions_asked.answer: For this discount level we need annual payment, but we can split into two installments

questions_asked.question: Are we aligned on moving forward?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, pending procurement review of contract terms

touches.ai_summary: Brief exec meeting with Amelia Garcia to confirm final details and timeline. Discussed success metrics and quarterly business reviews. Amelia confirmed approval and commitment to move forward pending procurement's contract review.

questions_asked.question: What does your onboarding support look like?
questions_asked.answer: Dedicated CSM, weekly check-ins first month, custom playbook development included

questions_asked.question: Anything else needed to finalize?
questions_asked.answer: Just contract review from Amelia Baker, should have that done this week

outcome.churn_reason: did not see enough ROI for the price
